text.title: Feature Flag Services, Testing, and Agentic Workflow Procedure
text.summary: 5-step procedure applying the feature-flags-services-testing methodology end-to-end. Each step lists inputs, action, output, and optional decision gate.

step.name: select-service
step.action: Map needs against OpenFeature, LaunchDarkly, GrowthBook, Statsig, or internal. Document decision.

step.name: write-fixtures
step.action: Add flag_on / flag_off fixtures in conftest.py.

step.name: test-both-branches
step.action: Add per-flag test pair: ON and OFF. Enforce in code review.

step.name: wire-stale-audit
step.action: Add stale_flag_audit.py + weekly CI job; fail on stale.

step.name: configure-cleanup-agent
step.action: Schedule an agent that opens cleanup tickets when criteria match.
